sources.name: Local Government Association
sources.dataset: Local Authority Revenue Expenditure and Financing: Culture and Recreation

sources.name: DCMS
sources.dataset: Creative Industries Sector Vision and Economic Estimates

metadata.methodology: ACE grant-in-aid figures deflated using HM Treasury GDP deflator (2010 prices). Local authority spending from MHCLG Revenue Outturn (RO) returns, culture and related services. Both series exclude capital expenditure and lottery distribution.
knownIssues: ACE figures include administration costs; comparisons with earlier years affected by changes in organisational scope
Local authority culture spend definition broadened in 2018 to include some library expenditure; pre-2018 figures may understate
COVID-related emergency ACE packages (2020-21) distort the trend; represented as one-off additions to grant-in-aid
